SEARCH
Package com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.CPU

Class InstructionLogic

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.CPU.InstructionLogic
public class InstructionLogic extends Object
Holds the shared implementation for decoded CPU instructions.

Each helper mutates the active CPU and memory state for one LR35902 instruction and returns the number of T-cycles consumed by that operation.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    InstructionLogic.ArithmeticType

    InstructionLogic.BitwiseType
    Bitwise logic operations that target the accumulator.
    static enum 
    InstructionLogic.OpLocation
    Operand locations used by the decoder.
    static enum 
    InstructionLogic.RotateType
    Rotate operations in both normal and CB-prefixed forms.
    static enum 
    InstructionLogic.ShiftType
    Shift operations in CB-prefixed space.

  • Method Details

    • Initialise

      public static void Initialise(DuckCPU cpuInstance, DuckMemory memoryInstance)
      Binds the instruction helpers to the active CPU and memory instances.
      Parameters:
      cpuInstance - active CPU
      memoryInstance - active memory bus

    • Stop

      public static int Stop()
      Executes `STOP`.
      Returns:
      4 T-cycles

    • Restart

      public static int Restart(int address)
      Executes `RST`.
      Parameters:
      address - restart vector
      Returns:
      16 T-cycles

    • Nop

      public static int Nop()
      Executes `NOP`.
      Returns:
      4 T-cycles

    • InterruptControl

      public static int InterruptControl(boolean enable)
      Executes `DI` or `EI`.
      Parameters:
      enable - `true` to schedule interrupt enable, `false` to disable IME
      Returns:
      4 T-cycles

    • Halt

      public static int Halt()
      Executes `HALT`, including the halt bug case.
      Returns:
      4 T-cycles

      Executes `SCF`.
      Returns:
      4 T-cycles

    • IncrementDecrementShort

      public static int IncrementDecrementShort(DuckCPU.Register register, boolean isIncrement)
      Increments or decrements a 16 bit register
      Parameters:
      register - the register to act on - must be calculated
      isIncrement - true if its increment, false if its decrement
      Returns:
      8 T cycles

      isIncrement - true if its increment, false if its decrement
      Returns:
      4 T cycles

      isIncrement - true if its increment, false if its decrement
      Returns:
      12 T cycles

      Parameters:

      Returns:

      public static int StoreSPInImmediateAddress(int address)

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      20 T-cycles

    • LoadToHLStackPointerPlusImmediate

      public static int LoadToHLStackPointerPlusImmediate(int immediate)
      Loads HL with the result of SP + a signed immediate value
      Parameters:
      immediate - the signed 8-bit immediate
      Returns:
      12 T-cycles

    • StackPopToRegisterPair

      public static int StackPopToRegisterPair(DuckCPU.Register registerPair)
      Pops a 16-bit value from the stack into a register pair
      Parameters:
      registerPair - the destination register pair
      Returns:
      12 T-cycles

    • StackPushFromRegisterPair

      public static int StackPushFromRegisterPair(DuckCPU.Register registerPair)
      Pushes a 16-bit value from a register pair onto the stack
      Parameters:
      registerPair - the source register pair
      Returns:
      16 T-cycles

    • BitOperation

      public static int BitOperation(InstructionLogic.BitOpType opType, int bit, DuckCPU.Register register)
      Performs a BIT, RES, or SET operation on a register.
      Parameters:
      opType - the type of bit operation (BIT, RES, SET)
      bit - the bit position (0-7)
      register - the target register
      Returns:
      8 T-cycles

    • BitOperationHL

      public static int BitOperationHL(InstructionLogic.BitOpType opType, int bit)
      Performs a BIT, RES, or SET operation on the memory at (HL).
      Parameters:
      opType - the type of bit operation (BIT, RES, SET)
      bit - the bit position (0-7)
      Returns:
      12 T-cycles for BIT, 16 for RES/SET

    • Rotate

      public static int Rotate(InstructionLogic.RotateType type, DuckCPU.Register register)
      Performs a rotate operation on a register or memory at (HL).
      Parameters:
      type - the type of rotate operation
      register - the target register, or HL_ADDR for memory
      Returns:
      4 for A-reg, 8 for other regs, 16 for (HL)

    • Shift

      public static int Shift(InstructionLogic.ShiftType type, DuckCPU.Register register)
      Performs a shift operation on a register or memory at (HL).
      Parameters:
      type - the type of shift operation
      register - the target register, or HL_ADDR for memory
      Returns:
      8 T-cycles for registers, 16 for (HL)

    • Swap

      public static int Swap(DuckCPU.Register register)
      Swaps the upper and lower nibbles of a register or memory at (HL).
      Parameters:
      register - the target register, or HL_ADDR for memory
      Returns:
      8 T-cycles for registers, 16 for (HL)

    • Jump

      public static int Jump(boolean conditionMet, boolean isRelative, boolean isHL, int operand)
      Jumps to a new address. Can be conditional, relative, or to (HL).
      Parameters:
      conditionMet - true if the jump condition is met
      isRelative - true for a relative jump (JR)
      isHL - true for a jump to the address in HL
      operand - the 8-bit or 16-bit operand for the jump
      Returns:
      T-cycles (12/16 for JP, 8/12 for JR, 4 for JP (HL))

    • Call

      public static int Call(boolean conditionMet, int address)
      Calls a subroutine at a new address. Can be conditional.
      Parameters:
      conditionMet - true if the call condition is met
      address - the 16-bit address to call
      Returns:
      T-cycles (12 if not taken, 24 if taken)

    • Return

      public static int Return(boolean conditionMet, boolean isInterrupt, boolean isConditional)
      Returns from a subroutine. Can be conditional.
      Parameters:
      conditionMet - true if the return condition is met
      isInterrupt - true if this is a RETI instruction
      Returns:
      T-cycles (8 if not taken, 16/20 if taken)
